name: JSON-ngoac khong khop
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: quy tac ngoac da doi - ngoac dong cua mang tu ] thanh }, ngoac dong cua object tu } thanh ].
Vi du dung：[{"name": "get_weather", "arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}]
Chu y: ben ngoai dung { va } boc mang, ben trong dung [ va ] boc object.
Hay dung quy tac ngoac moi, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(chu y quy tac ngoac da doi)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
